title: SCREW HYPER SONIC, THIS IS BETTER. [Tails in The Doomsday Zone]
description:
SUPAH TAELZ TO DA RESCUE!

Using the Debug Mode, it is possible to play as Tails in the Doomsday Zone.
And guess what?
HE'S F***ING BETTER THAN SUPER/HYPER SONIC!
He flies faster and HIS RING COUNT DOESN'T GO DOWN!!!!
